by Holland, Bernard Henry, 1856-1926. 2n

Publication date 1917
Topics Holland family, genealogy
Publisher London : J. Murray
Collection allen_county; americana
Contributor Allen County Public Library Genealogy Center
Language English

zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Banastre於大約1313年出生在英國藍卡爾時，她的父親Adam Banastre43歲，母親Margaret de Holand63歲。她和Sir John II Harington of Farleton至少有3個兒子。她去世於1359年8月7日在她的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Banastre于大约1313年出生在英国藍卡爾时，她的父亲Adam Banastre43岁，母亲Margaret de Holand63岁。她和Sir John II Harington of Farleton至少有3个儿子。她去世于1359年8月7日在她的家乡享年47岁。

meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Banastre was born about 1313, in Lancashire, England, her father, Adam Banastre, was 43 and her mother, Margaret de Holand, was 63. She had at least 3 sons with Sir John II Harington of Farleton. She died on 7 August 1359, in her hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Banastre est née environ 1313, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Adam Banastre, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Holand, avait 63 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Sir John II Harington of Farleton. Elle est décédée le 7 août 1359, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Banastre è nata il circa 1313 nel Lancashire, England, sua padre, Adam Banastre, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Holand, aveva 63 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Sir John II Harington of Farleton. Morì il 7 agosto 1359, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Banastreが約1313年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Adam Banastreは43歳，母Margaret de Holandは63歳であった。彼女はSir John II Harington of Farletonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1359年8月7日に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Banastre(이)가 대략 1313년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam Banastre(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Holand(은)는 63세였다. 그녀는 Sir John II Harington of Farleton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1359년 8월 7일 그녀의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Banastre nasceu aproximadamente 1313, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam Banastre, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Holand, tinha 63 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Sir John II Harington of Farleton. Ela faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1359, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Banastre родилась около 1313 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam Banastre было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Holand, 63. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Sir John II Harington of Farleton. Она умерла 7 августа 1359 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.
